item.title: Utawarerumono: Past and Present Rediscovered gameplay with the voice cast
item.content:encoded:
• PC
  • PS5
  • Switch 2

A look at the PlayStation 5 version in action.

AQUAPLUS has released an 77-minute video in which the Utawarerumono: Past and Present Rediscovered voice cast showcases the upcoming turn-based RPG.

In the video, Oshtor and Halu voice actor Kentaro Tone, Mikazuchi voice actor Yuuya Uchida, and Shunrai and Mira voice actor Yuuki Kuwahara play through the PlayStation 5 version of the game.

Utawarerumono: Past and Present Rediscovered is due out for PlayStation 5 and Switch 2 in Japan and PC via Steam worldwide on May 28.

Watch the footage below.

Let’s Play with the Voice Cast



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/04/utawarerumono-past-and-present-rediscovered-gameplay-with-the-voice-cast
